CONTENT.Club career: On 24 June 2024, Sissoko signed a three-year contract with VfL Bochum in Germany.

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 12 May 2024As of match played 17 October 2023
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Sissoko is of Malian descent. He was a youth international for France, having played up to the France U21s. He was called up to the Mali national team for a set of friendlies in October 2023.

SUMMARY: Ibrahima Sissoko (born 27 October 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for German Bundesliga club VfL Bochum. Born in France, he plays for the Mali national team.
